summary: Iteration 40: Product Structure Rebuild Testing - All 6 narrative layers verified working. (1) EntryLayer with Hebrew manifesto text, (2) DailyOpeningSection with compass/dominant force, (3) OppositionLayer with 4 tension pairs, (4) DailyOrientationQuestion with action button, (5) FieldImpactLayer with field stats (136 actions), (6) ClosingLayer with narrative reflection. Community toggle working. All 5 tabs functional.
critical_code_review_comments: HomeTab correctly imports and renders 6 layers in narrative order
EntryLayer is static component with Hebrew manifesto text - no API calls needed
OppositionLayer fetches daily-opening data for compass state to show position on 4 tension bars
FieldImpactLayer fetches globe-activity for field stats
ClosingLayer fetches day-summary - closing-tomorrow only shows when user has actions today
Community section properly collapsible with toggle button
All data-testid attributes present as specified

success_rate.backend: 100% (4/4 API endpoints verified: daily-opening, day-summary, globe-activity, directions)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Product structure rebuild complete. 6 narrative layers testids: entry-layer, daily-opening-section, opposition-layer (with opposition-pair-0 to opposition-pair-3), daily-orientation-question, field-impact-layer, closing-layer (with closing-tomorrow when actions exist). Community toggle: toggle-community-section. Tab testids: tab-home, tab-insights, tab-system, tab-theory, tab-history. Backend APIs unchanged: /api/orientation/daily-opening/{userId}, /api/orientation/day-summary/{userId}, /api/orientation/globe-activity, /api/orientation/directions.
